messages.content: We previously discussed your J.A.R.V.I.S project, a conversational AI system with automatic query routing, and I also helped with counting and provided information on your profile picture and other topics, Alfaaz Khan.
I'm not sure what you mean by that, Alfaaz Khan, could you please clarify or provide more context.
I can't engage in conversation that involves profanity or inappropriate language, Sir. Is there something else I can help you with?
